nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 拟大朱雀
nodes.summary: 拟大朱雀（Carpodacus rubicilloides）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如拟大朱雀。

nodes.name: 拟大朱雀
nodes.summary: The streaked rosefinch (Carpodacus rubicilloides) is a true finch species (family Fringillidae). It is found on the Himalayan Plateau. Its natural habitat is boreal shrubland. Two subspecies are recognised: C. r. rubicilloides - eastern Tibet to central and southern China C. r. lucifer - southern Tibet and the Himalayas References
nodes.shortSummary: The streaked rosefinch (Carpodacus rubicilloides) is a true finch species (family Fringillidae). It is found on the Himalayan Plateau.

nodes.name: Carpodacus
nodes.summary: Carpodacus（Carpodacus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联24种鸟类，如血雀、喜山红腰朱雀、曙红朱雀等24种鸟类。
